hooks.command: python -c "import subprocess,pathlib,sys; p=pathlib.Path('tests'); fs=list(p.glob('test_*.py')) if p.exists() else []; (print('no tests yet') or sys.exit(0)) if not fs else sys.exit(subprocess.run(['python','-m','pytest','tests/','-q']).returncode)"

python -c "import os,sys; t=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT',''); [sys.exit(print('BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어 감지됨 —',b,file=sys.stderr) or 1) for b in ['rm -rf','git push --force','git reset --hard','DROP TABLE'] if b.lower() in t.lower()]"
